# retro-handheld-configs

> Toolkit for retro handheld device backups, ADB-based customization, encrypted Aurora backup and restore, and SD-card workflow automation, currently centered on the Retroid Pocket Classic 6-button profile.

Start with the README for commands and device profile context. Use the workflows guide for end-to-end operator sequences. This repo is about managed device state and repeatable setup, not general emulator usage advice.

## Core Docs

- [README](./README.md): Scope, command inventory, profile details, backup layout, and operational behavior.
- [Docs Home](./docs/index.md): Short summary of the docs surface and intended workflows.
- [Workflows](./docs/workflows.md): Fresh baseline, managed customization, encrypted Aurora backup, and restore sequences.

## Optional

- [AGENTS](./AGENTS.md): Repo guardrails, operating model, and contributor constraints.
